columns.name: AllocationStatus
columns.description: Status of the NAT IP address allocation.

columns.name: ASN
columns.description: Autonomous System Number (ASN) associated with the destination IP.

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: City
columns.description: City of the destination IP address (geo-located).

columns.name: Continent
columns.description: Continent where the destination IP is located.

columns.name: Country
columns.description: Country of the destination IP address (geo-located).

columns.name: DestinationRegion
columns.description: Continent or larger geographical region of the destination.

columns.name: DestIp
columns.description: Destination external IP address the traffic was sent to.

columns.name: DestPort
columns.description: Destination port on the remote host.

columns.name: EndpointRegion
columns.description: Region of the destination endpoint.

columns.name: EndpointZone
columns.description: Zone of the destination endpoint if applicable.

columns.name: GatewayName
columns.description: Name of the Cloud NAT gateway instance.

columns.name: GCPResourceType
columns.description: Type of the monitored GCP resource (e.g., 'router', 'gce_instance').

columns.name: InsertId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the log entry within the GCP logging system.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: LogName
columns.description: Name of the log stream.

columns.name: NatIp
columns.description: Public NAT IP address assigned for this flow.

columns.name: NatPort
columns.description: Public NAT port assigned for this flow.

columns.name: ProjectId
columns.description: ID of the GCP project that generated the log entry.

columns.name: Protocol
columns.description: Network protocol used in the connection.

columns.name: ReceiveTimestamp
columns.description: The time the log entry was received by GCP Logging.

columns.name: Region
columns.description: Region of the GCP resource involved in the NAT traffic.

columns.name: RouterId
columns.description: Identifier of the Cloud Router managing the NAT gateway.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: SrcIp
columns.description: Source internal IP address from which the traffic originated.

columns.name: SrcPort
columns.description: Source port on the internal VM or resource.

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp when the log was ingested by Log Analytics.

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table

columns.name: VmName
columns.description: Name of the virtual machine that initiated the NAT traffic.
